entry.title: Introduction
entry.content:
Introduction

This is the root-level introduction document.

Cross-File References

This demonstrates the nested introduction with path-prefixed handle.

You can also reference Chapter 1 in the chapters directory.

Back References

The nested intro should link back here using the root introduction (bare handle since we’re the unique “intro” at root level).

entry.title: Chapter Introduction
entry.content:
Chapter Introduction

This is a nested introduction that shares the “intro” stem with the root-level intro.typ.

Handle Scheme

rheo assigns handles based on path:

  • Root files: bare handle (e.g. )
  • Nested files: ‘:’-prefixed handle (e.g. )

Cross-References

Link back to the root introduction using the bare handle.

Reference Chapter 1 in the same directory.

Continue to the next chapter for more content.

entry.title: Chapter One: The Beginning
entry.content:
Chapter 1: The Beginning

This is the first actual chapter content.

References

Reference back to the root introduction and the nested introduction.

Both work correctly: root-level files get bare handles, nested files get ‘:’-prefixed handles.

Self Reference

This chapter can be referenced as Chapter 1.

Content

Some example chapter content here.
